title: Welcome to Prez Lite
description: This guided tour will walk you through the main features of the vocabulary browser. You can switch between auto and manual modes at any time.

title: Navigation
description: Use the navigation menu to move between the main sections of the site — vocabularies, search, sharing, and documentation pages.

title: Vocabularies Page
description: Let’s visit the vocabularies page to browse the available concept schemes.

title: Search Vocabularies
description: Filter vocabularies by name using the search input. Results update instantly as you type.

title: Vocabulary Cards
description: Each card shows a vocabulary with its name, description, concept count, version, and validation status. Click a card to explore its concepts.

title: Vocabulary Detail
description: This page has three collapsible panels: Concepts, Collections, and Metadata. You can click any panel header to collapse or expand it. Let’s try it.

title: Collapse a Panel
description: Click the Concepts header to collapse the panel. This keeps the page tidy when you want to focus on other sections.

title: Expand It Back
description: Click again to expand the panel. All three sections work the same way.

title: Search Concepts
description: Quickly find concepts within this vocabulary by typing keywords. The tree filters in real time.

title: Select a Concept
description: Click any concept to view its details — properties, relationships, and linked data appear in the side panel.

title: Expand a Node
description: Click the arrow to expand a concept and reveal its narrower (child) concepts in the hierarchy.

title: Vocabulary Metadata
description: The Metadata panel shows detailed information about the vocabulary — publisher, version, licence, and other DCAT/Schema.org properties.

title: Metadata Fields
description: You’ll find properties like title, description, creator, publisher, date modified, and licence. These come from the vocabulary’s RDF metadata.

title: Share & Export
description: Click the share button to access export formats, download links, and embeddable web component snippets.

title: Export Formats
description: The share page offers your vocabulary in multiple serialisations. A live preview shows each format’s content on the left.

title: Download Sidebar
description: Download the vocabulary in Turtle, Annotated Turtle, JSON, JSON-LD, RDF/XML, CSV, or HTML. Each row has download and copy-URL buttons.

title: Preview a Format
description: Click any format row to load a live preview. The source view shows raw content; some formats also offer a rendered or tree view.

title: Interactive Preview
description: Below the exports is an interactive playground where you can configure and preview the prez-list web component with your vocabulary.

title: Component Types
description: Choose between select (default tree), dropdown, radio, or table display modes. Each renders the vocabulary differently.

title: Attribute Options
description: Toggle options like flat (no hierarchy), search, multiple selection, descriptions, and more. The live preview and code snippet update instantly.

title: Tour Complete!
description: You’ve seen the main features of Prez Lite — browsing vocabularies, exploring concept hierarchies, exporting data, and embedding interactive web components. Restart this tour anytime from the header.
